fields.title: Catan
fields.description: Players collect and trade resources to build settlements, cities, and roads to reach 10 victory points. A classic game of strategy, negotiation, and resource management.

fields.title: Ticket to Ride
fields.description: Players collect cards of various types of train cars they use to claim railway routes connecting cities across North America. The longer the routes, the more points earned.

fields.title: Pandemic
fields.description: A cooperative game where players work as a team to treat infections around the world while gathering resources for cures. Players must work together against the game to win.

fields.title: Azul
fields.description: Players take turns drafting colored tiles from suppliers to decorate their palace walls. Strategic tile placement and pattern completion earns victory points.

fields.title: Scythe
fields.description: An engine-building game set in an alternate-history 1920s period. Players conquer territory, enlist new recruits, produce resources, and build their economic infrastructure.

fields.title: Wingspan
fields.description: A competitive bird-collection, engine-building game. Players attract birds to their wildlife preserves, gaining food, laying eggs, and collecting birds to score points.

fields.title: Codenames
fields.description: A social word game with a simple premise and challenging gameplay. Two rival spymasters know the secret identities of 25 agents, and their teammates need to contact them all first.

fields.title: Root
fields.description: An asymmetric game of woodland warfare where players battle for control using different faction powers and strategies. Each faction plays entirely differently.

fields.title: Terraforming Mars
fields.description: Players represent corporations working together to terraform Mars by raising temperature, creating oxygen, and making oceans. Players compete for victory points through various projects.

fields.title: Gloomhaven
fields.description: A cooperative campaign-based dungeon crawl game with legacy elements. Players work through a campaign of tactical combat scenarios, unlocking new content as they progress.
